words.exampleArabic: يَذْهَبُ الطِّفْلُ إِلَى الْمَدْرَسَةِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
words.exampleBs: Dijete ide u školu svaki dan.
words.exampleEn: The child goes to school every day.

words.exampleBs: Sara se upisala na univerzitet ove godine.
words.exampleEn: Sara enrolled in university this year.

words.exampleBs: Učionica je čista i uredna.
words.exampleEn: The classroom is clean and tidy.

words.exampleBs: Nastavnik objašnjava lekciju jasno.
words.exampleEn: The teacher explains the lesson clearly.

words.exampleBs: Student je marljiv u svom učenju.
words.exampleEn: The student is diligent in his studies.

words.exampleBs: Čas je počeo u osam ujutro.
words.exampleEn: The lesson started at eight in the morning.

words.exampleBs: Sutra ću polagati ispit.
words.exampleEn: I will take the exam tomorrow.

words.exampleArabic: حَصَلْتُ عَلَى دَرَجَةٍ عَالِيَةٍ فِي الِامْتِحَانِ.
words.exampleBs: Dobio sam visoku ocjenu na ispitu.
words.exampleEn: I got a high grade on the exam.

words.exampleArabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ أُنْهِيَ الْوَاجِبَ الْمَنْزِلِيَّ الْيَوْمَ.
words.exampleBs: Moram završiti domaći zadatak danas.
words.exampleEn: I must finish the homework today.

words.exampleBs: Provodim dugo vremena u biblioteci.
words.exampleEn: I spend a long time in the library.

words.exampleBs: Matematika je moj omiljeni predmet.
words.exampleEn: Mathematics is my favourite subject.

words.exampleBs: Zaboravio sam olovku kod kuće.
words.exampleEn: I forgot my pencil at home.

words.exampleBs: Zapisao sam bilješke u svesku.
words.exampleEn: I wrote the notes in the notebook.

words.exampleBs: Ahmed je dugo učio prije ispita.
words.exampleEn: Ahmed studied for a long time before the exam.

words.exampleBs: Dijete je brzo naučilo nove riječi.
words.exampleEn: The child learned the new words quickly.

words.exampleBs: Profesor je podučio studente gramatičkim pravilima.
words.exampleEn: The professor taught the students the rules of grammar.

words.exampleBs: Učenica je pročitala cijelu knjigu.
words.exampleEn: The female student read the entire book.

words.exampleBs: Da li si razumio novu lekciju?
words.exampleEn: Did you understand the new lesson?

words.exampleBs: Položio je ispit s odličnim uspjehom.
words.exampleEn: He passed the exam with distinction.

words.exampleBs: Pao je na predmetu hemije.
words.exampleEn: He failed the chemistry subject.

words.exampleArabic: حَصَلَ عَلَى مِنْحَةٍ دِرَاسِيَّةٍ لِلدِّرَاسَةِ فِي الْخَارِجِ.
words.exampleBs: Dobio je stipendiju za studiranje u inostranstvu.
words.exampleEn: He received a scholarship to study abroad.

words.exampleBs: Znanje je svjetlost, a neznanje je tama.
words.exampleEn: Knowledge is light and ignorance is darkness.

words.exampleBs: Voli studirati eksperimentalne nauke.
words.exampleEn: He loves studying the experimental sciences.

words.exampleArabic: كَتَبَتِ الطَّالِبَةُ بَحْثًا عَنْ تَغَيُّرِ الْمَنَاخِ.
words.exampleBs: Studentica je napisala istraživački rad o klimatskim promjenama.
words.exampleEn: The female student wrote a research paper on climate change.

words.exampleBs: Proslavio je diplomiranje sa svojom porodicom.
words.exampleEn: He celebrated his graduation with his family.

words.exampleArabic: تَمَّ تَحْدِيثُ الْمَنْهَجِ الدِّرَاسِيِّ هَذَا الْعَامَ.
words.exampleBs: Nastavni plan je ažuriran ove godine.
words.exampleEn: The curriculum was updated this year.

words.exampleBs: Dobio je diplomu prvog ciklusa.
words.exampleEn: He obtained a bachelor's degree certificate.

words.exampleBs: Studenti su prisustvovali predavanju s pažnjom.
words.exampleEn: The students attended the lecture with interest.

words.exampleBs: Proveli smo eksperimente u laboratoriji.
words.exampleEn: We conducted experiments in the laboratory.

words.exampleBs: Profesor je specijaliziran za arapsku književnost.
words.exampleEn: The professor specialises in Arabic literature.

words.exampleBs: Kupio sam novu knjigu iz knjižare.
words.exampleEn: I bought a new book from the bookstore.

words.exampleBs: Nastavnik je napisao odgovor na tabli.
words.exampleEn: The teacher wrote the answer on the blackboard.

words.exampleBs: Ja sam u sedmom razredu.
words.exampleEn: I am in the seventh grade.

words.exampleBs: Obrazovanje je pravo svakog čovjeka.
words.exampleEn: Education is a right for every person.

words.exampleBs: Znanje otvara vrata budućnosti.
words.exampleEn: Knowledge opens the doors of the future.

words.exampleBs: Student je brzo riješio matematički zadatak.
words.exampleEn: The student solved the mathematical problem quickly.

words.exampleBs: Napisao sam izvještaj o svom naučnom izletu.
words.exampleEn: I wrote a report about my field trip.

words.exampleBs: Studira u Institutu za jezike.
words.exampleEn: She studies at the Language Institute.

words.exampleBs: Redovno učenje daje dobre rezultate.
words.exampleEn: Regular studying produces good results.

words.exampleBs: Maturirao je iz opće srednje škole s odličnim uspjehom.
words.exampleEn: He graduated from general secondary school with distinction.

words.exampleBs: Dobro vaspitanje počinje kod kuće.
words.exampleEn: Good upbringing begins at home.
